query: /database-architect migrate Plan a zero-downtime migration to add a user_preferences JSONB column to the users table (PostgreSQL, 50M rows)
expected_behavior: Agent runs migration-validator.py to classify the operation
Agent reads references/migration-patterns.md for zero-downtime strategies
Agent generates up migration SQL (ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN user_preferences JSONB)
Agent generates down migration SQL (ALTER TABLE users DROP COLUMN user_preferences)
Agent addresses zero-downtime: column addition is safe without expand-contract for 50M rows
Agent includes rollback plan with risk assessment
Agent flags that JSONB column addition does not require a table rewrite in PostgreSQL
Agent follows NNNN_description migration naming convention
